phrases.en: Jenny runs some water over her toothbrush.
phrases.zh: 珍妮在牙刷上冲一些水。

phrases.en: She squeezes toothpaste onto her toothbrush.
She moves her toothbrush up and down.
To rinse her mouth, she takes some water.
She swishes it back and forth in her mouth.
And spits it into the sink.
Then, she puts it back in the toothbrush rack.
phrases.zh: 然后，她把牙刷放回牙刷架上。

phrases.en: She flosses her teeth by pulling out a long piece of floss.
phrases.zh: 她用牙线洁牙，先拉出一长段牙线。

phrases.en: And moving it back and forth and up and down.
